flows.01_auth_role_selection.yaml:
appId: com.abdullah.reacttabibok
---
- clearState
- launchApp
- waitForAnimationToEnd
- assertVisible: "Choose your role to continue"
- takeScreenshot: "role_selection_screen"
- waitForAnimationToEnd
- assertVisible:
    id: "role-card-patient"
- assertVisible:
    id: "role-card-doctor"
- assertVisible:
    id: "role-card-receptionist"
- takeScreenshot: "all_roles_visible"
- tapOn:
    id: "role-card-patient"
- waitForAnimationToEnd
- takeScreenshot: "phone_auth_screen"

flows.19_patient_notifications.yaml:
appId: com.abdullah.reacttabibok
---

# ── Auto-injected login (doctor) ──────────────────────
- clearState
- launchApp
- waitForAnimationToEnd
- assertVisible: "Choose your role to continue"
- waitForAnimationToEnd
- tapOn:
    id: "role-card-doctor"
- waitForAnimationToEnd
- assertVisible: "Email Address"
- tapOn: "Enter your email"
- inputText: ${TEST_DOCTOR_EMAIL}
- tapOn: "Enter your password"
- inputText: ${TEST_PASSWORD}
- tapOn: "Sign In"
- waitForAnimationToEnd
# ── End login ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# ── Check for notification badge (any count) ──
- runFlow:
    when:
      visible: "*"
    commands:
      - takeScreenshot: "home_with_badge"
    timeout: 5000

# ── Navigate to Doctor Notifications ──
# Navigate to Notifications via menu or tab
- scrollUntilVisible:
    element: "Notifications"
    timeout: 8000
- tapOn: "Notifications"
- waitForAnimationToEnd

# ── Handle Notifications Screen ──
- assertVisible: "Notifications"
- takeScreenshot: "notifications_screen_loaded"

# Check if notifications exist
- runFlow:
    when:
      visible: "No notifications"
    commands:
      - takeScreenshot: "empty_notifications"
      - back
- runFlow:
    when:
      visible: "Notifications"
    commands:
      - takeScreenshot: "notifications_loaded"
      # Tap first notification if available
      - runFlow:
          when:
            visible:
              index: 0
          commands:
            - tapOn:
                index: 0
            - waitForAnimationToEnd
            - takeScreenshot: "notification_details"
            - back
